title: 'If I do attend, I get killed': Donald Trump says he 'has a thing called Iran' stopping him from attending son's wedding
summary_full: Amid escalating Iran tensions, President Trump expressed uncertainty about attending his son Donald Trump Jr.'s wedding this weekend in the Bahamas. He joked about facing criticism from the "fake news" regardless of his attendance, citing security concerns and the difficult timing due to international developments.
